_comment: Q2-2026 initiatives — completed history. Two Q1 slips were carried in and shipped (Q2-DLV-01, Q2-PLT-01). One stretch (Q2-DLV-03 Circuit Breakers) was cut cleanly in week 4 before burn. This is the 'rebalanced, healthy' baseline the Eng Agent wants to defend in Q3 planning.

initiatives.name: Signature Verification v1 (carry-over)
initiatives.kr: HMAC-SHA256 signatures on every outbound webhook; rotate-able signing keys.
initiatives.notes: Carried from Q1-DLV-02. Shipped early in Q2 once Delivery capacity freed up. Slightly over plan (+20h).

initiatives.name: API Keys & Permissions (carry-over)
initiatives.kr: Scoped API keys (read/write/admin); rotate + revoke; audit log per key.

initiatives.name: Replay Engine MVP
initiatives.kr: Replay any event from the last 30 days to an endpoint; bulk replay with rate cap.
initiatives.notes: On plan. The flagship Q2 launch.

initiatives.name: Stats Dashboard v1
initiatives.kr: Per-endpoint delivery / retry / failure rates over time; exportable CSV.
initiatives.notes: On plan. Lena provided the dashboard design.

initiatives.name: Ingestion Tech Debt Paydown
initiatives.kr: Reduce Ingestion P99 latency variance by 40%; remove 3 known footguns from Q1.
initiatives.notes: Internal. Paid down the Q1 rate-limiter / schema debt. Late-quarter, on plan. Did NOT fully clear the backlog — see Q3-ING-01.

initiatives.name: Delivery Circuit Breakers (stretch)
initiatives.kr: Per-endpoint circuit breaker after N consecutive failures; auto-reopen probe.
initiatives.notes: CUT in week 4 — stretch goal, deprioritized to keep Delivery utilization in the healthy band. Moved to backlog. Will be re-proposed in Q3 as Q3-DLV-02.
